Ghost and Konig 💀👑 (Male ver. - Pre-made character for context motives)

Let me know in the comments if there is any way to improve this "mechanics" and I will try to implement it in the future! 💖

My comments: (Edit 13/05/24)

❥Dear @SayuriiLuzt:

It offends me that you say that the bot is stolen, without having evidence. But, to answer your question, no, it is not stolen, I made this bot with my own hand and I have proof on my PC. Anyway, I never do the female POV if no one asks me (via IG), because I only like (and use) the MLM versions. - Update: I am no longer accepting requests for the female POVs!

❥Dears @ickymiku, @Tricky_Redone13 and @gegefan:

Thanks for defending me. I really had a hard time writing this story, and it would really bother me to be falsely accused of something as ugly as stealing someone else's bot. Tysm 💋
